steps.title: Identify the relationship
steps.content: The previous sentence establishes that the statues are “extremely heavy.” The sentence with the blank provides specific numerical evidence to reinforce this fact.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: ”In fact” is the transition that introduces evidence supporting a prior claim. The others all create different relationships—temporal shift, contrast, or hedging. That matches choice C — C is correct.
